mapper.select: SELECT l.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, mem.member_nm AS member_nm, prd.prod_nm AS target_nm, cd_ltt.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM mb_like l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = l.member_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = l.target_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ltt ON cd_ltt.code_grp = 'LIKE_TARGET_TYPE' AND cd_ltt.code_value = l.target_type_cd WHERE l.like_id = #{id}
